goal: Rewrite install.sh for .cnogo/ layout with manifest, version tracking, and lifecycle operations

changes.task: Rewrite install.sh core to copy from .cnogo/ layout
changes.notes: Source paths changed: scripts/*.py → .cnogo/scripts/*.py, scripts/hook-* → .cnogo/hooks/hook-*, docs/templates/ → .cnogo/templates/. Added context package copy, _bootstrap.py copy, gitignore block markers, updated memory init sys.path.

changes.task: Add manifest.json and version.json generation to install.sh
changes.notes: generate_manifest() walks MANAGED_PATHS, computes sha256, assigns ownership categories (managed/seeded/merged/scaffold). generate_version() reads git tag, commit, remote URL. Both called after all file copies.

do_uninstall() reads manifest, removes managed/scaffold files, cleans settings.json (_cnogo hooks) and .gitignore (block removal), keeps seeded files, removes .cnogo/. do_update() compares sha256 hashes, backs up user-modified managed files, overwrites, re-merges settings/gitignore, regenerates manifest. --force chains uninstall + fresh install.

commitMessage: feat(cnogo-packaging): rewrite install.sh with manifest, versioning, and lifecycle ops
